pr.title: Revert measurement loop fix, keep only theme propagation fix
pr.body:
## Summary

Reverts PR #1 (measurement loop fix) and keeps only the theme propagation fix from PR #2. 

The measurement loop fix was treating a symptom — the actual root cause was missing theme extensions causing `ShadowContainer` to throw errors on every frame, which in turn triggered infinite re-measurements. With the theme fix in place, the original scroll/measurement code works correctly.

After this PR, the only change relative to the upstream `wtf_sliding_sheet` v1.1.5 is one line in `sheet_dialog.dart`: wrapping the route content with `Theme(data: theme, child: sheet)`.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Test on iPhone:** Guests → Filters must open without freeze

### Notes

Once merged, update hugly-app `pubspec.yaml` to `ref: master`.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/9ded5d6fb84f4890be7f8b3d12e9e222
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
